In the National Food Security Act, 2013, for Schedule II, the following Schedule shall be substituted, namely:- SCHEDULE II [See sections 4(a), 5(1) and 6] NUTRITIONAL STANDARDS The nutritional standards as specified in the table below shall be provided to- (i) persons in the age group or physiological group under column (1) of the said Table, and shall be met by providing the type of meal as specified in column (2) thereof, in accordance with the Integrated Child Development Services Scheme’ and (if) children in the lower and upper primary classes under column (1) of the said Table, and shall be met by providing the type of meal as specified in column (2) thereof, under the PM Poshan Scheme. -- 3 of 5 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] Age/ Type of
